title: Create: Too Many Addons
description: A technical 1.20.1  modpack centered around Create and Applied Energistics 2 with a wide range of Create addons
body:
This modpack is a pack around the Create mod with a LOT of Create addons, a few storage mods, some Quality of Life mods, and a few decoration mods. This pack is a good way to get better at Create and Applied Energistics 2 and automation with the Create mod in general, enhanced by Create Ender Transmission for long distance item, fluid, and rotation transpostation. This pack also includes the Simple Voice Chat mod to play with friends, although you can remove it if you are planning on playing in singleplayer mode. Key mods: - Create - Applied Energistics - Create: Steam n' Rails - Create Enchantment Industry - Create: Connected - Create: More Drill Heads - Corpse - Sophisticated Backpacks - Waystones - Rechiseled Issues and feature requests can be posted on my issue tracker. Complete mod list:
